nasb.text: For we write nothing else to you than what you read and understand, and I hope you will understand until the end;

esv.text: For we are not writing to you anything other than what you read and understand and I hope you will fully understand—

cnv.text: 我們現在寫給你們的，不外是你們可以宣讀、可以明白的。

csbs.text: 其实我们写给你们的，无非是你们能读、能了解的，而且我希望你们能彻底地了解，
